about_description: An informational toolkit designed to assist legal and non-legal professionals in identifying, investigating, addressing and seeking accountability for the deliberate use of mass starvation as a tool against civilians.
contact_description:
For legal advice and other enquiries, please contact us at:

[starvationaccountability@globalrightscompliance.co.uk](mailto:starvationaccountability@globalrightscompliance.co.uk) or [info@globalrightscompliance.co.uk](mailto:info@globalrightscompliance.co.uk).

***

Follow us on social media:

Twitter: [@GRC_HumanRights](https://twitter.com/GRC_HumanRights?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor)

Facebook: [@GlobalRightsCompliance](https://www.facebook.com/GlobalRightsCompliance/)

Linkedin: [Global Rights Compliance](https://uk.linkedin.com/company/global-rights-compliance)
copyright_description:
© Global Rights Compliance 2022. All rights reserved.

We encourage the use of the Starvation Accountability mobile app and the Starvation Training Manual: An International Framework Guide to the Law of Starvation (Second Edition). However, no part of the Starvation App or the Starvation Manual may be reproduced, distributed or transmitted in any form or by any means, without the prior written permission of GRC, except in the case of brief quotations embodied in critical reviews and certain other non-commercial usages permitted by copyright law.
disclaimer_description:
The views expressed in this app are those of GRC and may not coincide with the official position of our donors, The Netherlands' Ministry of Foreign Affairs.

The contents contained in this App are for information only and do not constitute legal advice. The users bear full responsibility for their own safety, their research as well as compliance with the relevant legal and/or policy requirements. GRC is not responsible or liable for any damages arising out of or in connection with the user's access to or use of this mobile app or on our websites ([starvationaccountability.org](https://starvationaccountability.org/) and [globalrightscompliance.com](https://globalrightscompliance.com/)).

For comprehensive and tailored advisory legal services, please contact us at: [starvationaccountability@globalrightscompliance.co.uk](mailto:starvationaccountability@globalrightscompliance.co.uk) or [info@globalrightscompliance.co.uk](mailto:info@globalrightscompliance.co.uk).

landing.description: For the safety and security of our users, the content of this app must be manually downloaded and updated. You are seeing this message because the app currently has no content downloaded. Please go to settings and download the most recent version of the app's content.
landing.skipMessage: You can download content later from Settings. Some features may not be available without content.
landing.infoNote: This ensures you always have the latest and most secure content.

settingsScreen.downloadMessage: To use all app features, you need to download the latest content. This includes articles, templates, and other resources.
settingsScreen.downloadSuccessMessage: Content has been successfully downloaded. The app is now ready to use!
settingsScreen.downloadError: Failed to download content. Please check your internet connection and try again.
